title: Sales Manager Vacancy at WeWork India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at WeWork India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!
